MADE FOR WHAT PREGNANCY DOES TO YOUR FEET.

Relaxin loosens the ligaments in your feet, arches drop, swelling builds through the third trimester. Most shoes fight it. [vrsn] flexes with it.

  • Feet spread and grow

    Feet can spread up to a full size, often for good. The wide toe box gives them room.

  • Arches drop

    Contoured support carries the flattening arch, easing foot and lower-back strain.

  • Swelling builds by 5pm

    The stretch-knit upper flexes with the swell instead of digging in.

Questions, answered

Do they run true to size?

Yes, with a roomier toe box than most sneakers. If you are between sizes or expecting more swelling, size up half. Exchanges are free either way.

Will they still fit as my feet change?

The stretch-knit upper and wide toe box are built to flex as feet spread and swell, so the same pair keeps fitting through the third trimester and after.

What is the free insole?

Every box includes the podiatrist-designed Pain Relief Insole, a $39 value, with a soft-contoured footbed that supports the arch pregnancy tends to flatten.

Can I really machine wash them?

Yes. Gentle cycle, cold water, air dry. Built for life with a bump and then a baby.

How does the 100-Day At-Home Trial work?

Wear them for up to 100 days, at home, on walks, anywhere. If they are not the most comfortable shoes you own, send them back for a full refund. Returns are free.

When will my order arrive?

Orders process in 1 to 2 business days and arrive 5 to 9 business days later. Shipping is free over $100.
